station.name: Starter FM
station.longDesc: We are Sydney’s No.1 Dance Music Station, playing the biggest hits and dance anthems 24/7 with the hottest line-up of Djs across the week and featuring local Australian Djs across the weekend.

station.name: Starter Bangaz
station.longDesc: The home of fresh beatz and chunky bangaz.

station.name: Chill with Starter
station.longDesc: Feel the warmth of beachside vibes as uplifting rhythms, soothing vocals, and sun-soaked grooves transport you to paradise. Whether you’re relaxing by the pool, catching the sunset on the coast, or dreaming of an island getaway, our tropical house and beach summer vibes bring the essence of summer right to you, wherever you are. Let the music set the tone for endless good vibes and unforgettable moments under the sun.

station.name: Starter Trance
station.desc: Non-Stop, New and Classic Trance Anthems
station.longDesc: Welcome to the home of trance, this is your destination for new and classic trance anthems plus the biggest shows like Group Therapy from Above & Beyond and more.

station.name: Hawkesbury Radio
station.desc: Hawkesbury's home of real local voices
station.longDesc: Hawkesbury Radio is a great little community radio station in Sydney's north west. Firmly founded in the local community, the station provides interesting content related to the Hawkesbury area, sports, music and talk aimed at the local listeners.

station.name: The Fresh Mix
station.desc: A fresh and different selection everyday
station.longDesc: The Fresh Mix breathes new life into your day with a huge archive of hits, popular and lost beyond the depths of the archives; you'll be surprised on what we'll dig up.  You'll hear everything from 50s crooners, to 80s new wave, up to current top 40.  The playlist will have an emphasis on the 70s 80s and 90s.  With over 16,000 tracks, as we say, We'll have a fresh and different selection everyday!

station.name: 4PLAY.fm
station.desc: The World's Best & Latest Club & Electronic Dance Music
station.longDesc: The World's Best & Latest Club & Electronic Dance Music.

station.name: Cherri Radio
station.longDesc: Sydney's local internet radio station streaming 24/7. Playing Today's Best Music All Day, Everyday!

station.name: INJABULO Africa
station.longDesc: Playing the latest Amapiano, Afrobeats and Hip-hop from across Africa and the world.

station.name: V1Radio
station.desc: Live and free from Melbourne, VIC
station.longDesc: V1 RADIO is a deep house and dance net station, broadcasting live and free in HD from Melbourne Australia with a selection of fresh tracks and unique remixes as well as weekly programs from renowned DJ's and artists locally and from around the world including London, Germany, Switzerland, USA, and Canada!

station.name: Tune1 Perth
station.desc: Live and free from Perth, WA
station.longDesc: Tune1 supports local music and hosting locally Australian produced programming featuring local announcers plus the best in globally produced shows!

station.name: Regent Radio
station.longDesc: Grab some popcorn and enjoy all your favorite hits on Regent Radio.
